method_notes: Candidate pool verified: all 14 selected companies grep-confirmed present in candidates_fr_south_nordics.csv (902 names, 12 focus sectors). User-suggested names NOT in the CSV and therefore excluded: Alstom, TotalEnergies, Airbus, Fincantieri, Atlas Copco, Sandvik, SKF, Equinor, Wartsila, KONE, Siemens Gamesa (Iberdrola included as the Spain green-energy lead instead).

Coverage: France 6, Italy 1, Spain 1, Denmark 2, Sweden 2, Finland 1, Norway 1 — all 7 mandated countries represented; sectors span Aerospace & Defence, Electricals, Pharma, Medical Devices, Green Energy, Telecom/Electronics, Chemicals. Prysmian (Italy, Ravin Cables 49%->100% buyout) was the 15th shortlisted lead, dropped to respect the 12-14 cap; noted here as a bonus signal.
Profitability checks are live yfinance TTM figures (netIncomeToCommon, profitMargins, marketCap) pulled 2026-07-20 in local currency; all 14 leads profitable.

Evidence hierarchy: (1) annual-report PDFs where search-indexed text could be attributed to the report (Dassault, Vestas, Ericsson, Novo Nordisk, Yara, Iberdrola), (2) the company's own press releases (Safran, Thales, Leonardo, Sanofi, Saab, Nokia, Schneider), (3) trade press (EssilorLuxottica only — flagged). Multi-hundred-page URDs (Schneider, Sanofi, EssilorLuxottica, Thales, Saab) were not parsed page-by-page; where a quote could not be tied to the report body it is flagged UNVERIFIED in-line.

Trade-agreement context: India-EFTA TEPA (signed Mar 2024, in force Oct 2025) carries a binding USD 100bn / 1 million jobs / 15-year investment commitment — the first of its kind in any Indian FTA — covering offshore wind, hydrogen, autonomous shipping, aquaculture and data centres; directly relevant to the Norwegian lead (Yara) and Norwegian defence/maritime names (Kongsberg is in the CSV as a further candidate). India-EU FTA (relevant to the other 6 countries) was still under negotiation as of the fetched sources; no company in this set cited it in 2025 reporting (no evidence found, not asserted).

Level rubric: HIGH = named India capex/plant/JV or India-led segment growth in FY2025 reporting; MEDIUM = real operations plus stated but unquantified expansion intent; LOW = APAC interest without India footprint; NONE = neither.
site_access_issues: manufacturingtodayindia.com returned HTTP 403 to WebFetch — EssilorLuxottica India manufacturing-expansion quote could not be verified verbatim (marked UNVERIFIED).

Large annual-report/URD PDFs (Schneider URD ~800pp, Nokia AR, Safran Integrated Report, Sanofi 20-F, Saab AR) were located but not parsed page-by-page within the fetch budget; evidence for those companies rests on company press releases and search-indexed report excerpts.
Iberdrola CNMV filing link uses a tokenized webservice URL unsuitable for direct fetch; FY25 results deck and Integrated Report used instead.
No paywall/login issues encountered on any IR site; all report PDFs above are publicly downloadable if deeper page-level quoting is needed.
